displayName: Canada – Temporary Resident to PR Pathway
shortDescription: IRCC · In-Canada PR pathways · CEC and eligible TR streams

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current Express Entry profile fee and PR application fee on canada.ca. CRS cutoffs change each draw—never promise ITA.

alert.title: Status at time of application
alert.body: Verify maintained status, eligible work history in Canada, and correct PR class before advising TR-to-PR filing.

about.label: Description
about.value: Federal economic immigration system managing FSW, CEC, and FST programs. Candidates create profile, receive CRS score, and apply for PR if invited (ITA).

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Meet FSW/CEC/FST criteria · Valid language tests · ECA for foreign education · Sufficient CRS score · Medical and police clearances

about.label: ITA not guaranteed
about.value: Profile in pool does not guarantee invitation. CRS cutoffs vary per draw. PNP can add 600 points.

about.label: After approval
about.value: COPR issued; complete landing; apply for PR card. Meet residency obligations for citizenship pathway.

eligibility.criterion: Valid temporary resident status or eligible restoration
Qualifying Canadian work experience documented (if CEC)
Language scores meet PR program minimums
Eligible PR program stream identified (CEC, spouse, PNP, etc.)
Medical and police certificates as required

redFlagsBanner: Without ITA, do not submit PR application. Improve CRS via language retake, ECA, PNP, or Canadian experience before expecting invitation.

redFlags.title: CRS below recent draw cutoffs
redFlags.description: Client expects ITA with non-competitive score.
redFlags.fix: Retake language for higher CLB; pursue PNP; gain Canadian work experience

redFlags.title: Wrong NOC/TEER code
redFlags.description: Work experience coded incorrectly affecting points.
redFlags.fix: Verify TEER category against official duties and reference letters

redFlags.title: Reference letter deficiencies
redFlags.description: Employer letters missing duties, hours, or dates.
redFlags.fix: Detailed reference on company letterhead matching NOC duties

redFlags.title: ECA not completed
redFlags.description: Foreign degree not assessed before profile.

redFlags.title: Language scores expired
redFlags.description: IELTS/CELPIP older than 2 years at ITA.
redFlags.fix: Retake before accepting ITA if expiring

redFlags.title: Misrepresentation risk
redFlags.fix: Honest accurate profile—misrepresentation has permanent consequences

faqs.q: Can we guarantee ITA or PR?
faqs.a: No. CRS cutoffs change each draw. We improve profile quality but never promise ITA or approval.

faqs.q: What CRS score needed?
faqs.a: Varies each draw—check recent IRCC draw results. Category-based draws have different cutoffs.

faqs.q: How to improve CRS?
faqs.a: Higher language scores, additional education ECA, Canadian work experience, PNP nomination (+600), French language bonus.

faqs.q: What is PNP?
faqs.a: Provincial Nominee Program—province nomination adds 600 CRS points, virtually ensuring ITA.

faqs.q: Processing after ITA?
faqs.a: Typically 6 months standard for most EE applications—verify current IRCC processing times.

faqs.q: Can spouse be included?
faqs.a: Yes—spouse factors into CRS; include if beneficial to score.

faqs.q: Proof of funds when?
faqs.a: Required at ITA stage for FSW; amount per family size on canada.ca.

faqs.q: What if ITA declined?
faqs.a: Profile may re-enter pool if valid—assess options carefully.

faqs.q: What is Description for this service?
faqs.a: Federal economic immigration system managing FSW, CEC, and FST programs. Candidates create profile, receive CRS score, and apply for PR if invited (ITA).

faqs.q: What is Eligible applicants for this service?
faqs.a: Meet FSW/CEC/FST criteria · Valid language tests · ECA for foreign education · Sufficient CRS score · Medical and police clearances

faqs.q: What is ITA not guaranteed for this service?
faqs.a: Profile in pool does not guarantee invitation. CRS cutoffs vary per draw. PNP can add 600 points.

faqs.q: Important note on ITA not guaranteed?
faqs.a: Profile in pool does not guarantee invitation. CRS cutoffs vary per draw. PNP can add 600 points.

faqs.q: What is Key authority for this service?
faqs.a: Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC)

faqs.q: What is After approval for this service?
faqs.a: COPR issued; complete landing; apply for PR card. Meet residency obligations for citizenship pathway.

faqs.q: Is Eligible program (FSW/CEC/FST) required?
faqs.a: Eligible program (FSW/CEC/FST) is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Language test (CLB minimum per program) required?
faqs.a: Language test (CLB minimum per program) is typically required.

faqs.q: Is ECA for foreign credentials (FSW) required?
faqs.a: WES/IQAS etc.

faqs.q: Is CRS score competitive for recent draws required?
faqs.a: Assess against recent cutoffs

faqs.q: Is Work experience documented (NOC/TEER) required?
faqs.a: Work experience documented (NOC/TEER) is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Proof of funds (FSW/ FST if applicable) required?
faqs.a: Proof of funds (FSW/ FST if applicable) is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Medical and police completed after ITA required?
faqs.a: Assess whether Medical and police completed after ITA is satisfied for this case.

faqs.q: What is the Processing time?
faqs.a: 6–12m — After ITA received

faqs.q: What is the Government fee?
faqs.a: CAD $1,525+ — PR application after ITA

faqs.q: What is the Our approval rate?
faqs.a: 94% — ~88% post-ITA benchmark

faqs.q: What is the Required docs?
faqs.a: 16 — + ECA, language, work ref

faqs.q: What is the Consultancy fee?
faqs.a: See fee tab — + govt & ECA/tests

faqs.q: What if the client has CRS below recent draw cutoffs?
faqs.a: Retake language for higher CLB; pursue PNP; gain Canadian work experience

faqs.q: Why is CRS below recent draw cutoffs a problem?
faqs.a: Client expects ITA with non-competitive score.

faqs.q: What if the client has Wrong NOC/TEER code?
faqs.a: Verify TEER category against official duties and reference letters

faqs.q: Why is Wrong NOC/TEER code a problem?
faqs.a: Work experience coded incorrectly affecting points.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
Paid RCIC representation requires valid CICC membership
proTips: Calculate CRS at intake with official calculator
Secure detailed employer reference letters early
PNP exploration if CRS below cutoff

changelog.summary: Initial Express Entry PR counselor content.

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: Never collect full PR fee before ITA—profile setup fee only until invitation received.

quiz.question: What is Express Entry?
options: An online system for managing certain economic PR applications
A temporary visitor visa category
A school admissions system
A passport renewal service
quiz.explanation: Express Entry manages profiles and applications for major federal economic programs.

quiz.question: What is an ITA?
options: Invitation to Apply
A temporary visitor visa category
A school admissions system
A passport renewal service
quiz.explanation: An ITA invites a candidate to submit a complete PR application.

quiz.question: What does FST stand for?
options: Federal Skilled Trades
A temporary visitor visa category
A school admissions system
A passport renewal service
quiz.explanation: FST is the federal skilled trades program.

quiz.question: Which federal programs are managed through Express Entry?
options: FSW, CEC, and FST
A temporary visitor visa category
A school admissions system
A passport renewal service
quiz.explanation: Express Entry includes Federal Skilled Worker, Canadian Experience Class, and Federal Skilled Trades.

quiz.question: What does FSW stand for?
options: Federal Skilled Worker
A temporary visitor visa category
A school admissions system
A passport renewal service
quiz.explanation: FSW is a federal economic program managed through Express Entry.

quiz.question: What can a provincial nomination do in Express Entry?
options: Add significant CRS points
A temporary visitor visa category
A school admissions system
A passport renewal service
quiz.explanation: An enhanced nomination can add major CRS points and often leads to an ITA.
